name: PR Input accepts a valid GitHub PR URL and shows loading state
description: When a user pastes a valid GitHub PR URL and clicks Analyze PR, the button shows a spinner and 'Analyzing...' text while the request is in flight.

planSteps.description: Paste 'https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/1' into the PR URL input field
The Analyze PR button changes to show a spinner icon and the text 'Analyzing...' while the analysis is running
The input field is disabled while loading is in progress
